findings.title: closeout_requirements.production_ready_requires swaps the stale S11 lock-acquisition verification key directly for the S02 normalization key, skipping any S01 verification key.
findings.rationale: The diff shows that immediately before S02 the array still carried control_plane_ai_implementation_handoff_lock_acquisition_rule_verified (S11) and never carried an S01-specific verification key. This indicates the array is not enforced to contain each subphase's own construction-inspection flag; actual enforcement lives in the per-subphase inspection checks in scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs. The S02 change itself is correct, but the array's apparent role as a reliable per-subphase closeout checklist is weaker than it looks. Non-blocking and not a boundary violation. Accept as-is for S02 (the control_plane_hermes_validation_request_normalization_verified entry is correct and matches the new inspection check). Optionally, in a later cleanup, decide whether production_ready_requires should hold a stable generic gate set rather than rotating one subphase-specific key, since per-subphase enforcement is already handled by the construction-inspection checks.

parsed_review.summary: S02 implements only Hermes Validation request normalization: it consumes an M00 S03 allow_metadata_only tenant-boundary precheck result for entrypoint hermes_validation, emits a frozen metadata-only normalized request carrying the S01 validation contexts, TEN-001..TEN-008 trace refs, and S01 acceptance gates, and defers tenant/Matter/permission/audit prechecks to S03-S06. Fail-closed guards reject non-hermes entrypoints, denied/wrong-marker prechecks, service-execution permission, real-data/write prechecks, and every forbidden or unknown input claim (product-write, service execution, runtime route, tenant-lifecycle mutation, Hermes execution/evidence, and requirement-trace/human-approval/tenant-boundary/Hermes-gate/Claude-review bypass), with the output asserting all execution and route flags false and no_real_data true. Policy/normalizer/validator, the synthetic fixture, the contract definition, and the standalone validator are mutually cross-checked and the test suite exercises the happy path, frozen-array immutability, and 18 fail-closed cases. H00/C00 and human-approval boundaries are preserved. Only a single P3 documentation-level observation on the production_ready_requires array; no P0/P1/P2 findings, so the single read-only C00 review is sufficient for closeout once the S02 production_ready evidence files are written.

p3.finding: closeout_requirements.production_ready_requires swaps the stale S11 lock-acquisition verification key directly for the S02 normalization key, skipping any S01 verification key.
p3.rationale: S02 correctly requires control_plane_hermes_validation_request_normalization_verified in both closeout requirements and the per-subphase construction inspection validator. The generic production_ready_requires rotation is a documentation/checklist cleanup concern outside the S02 request-normalization behavior and does not weaken the executable gate.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS, blocks_subphase_closeout false, blocks_goal_closeout false, with one P3 finding and no P0/P1/P2 findings.
